mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ARTAPPM A1 LEFT JOIN ARTPROD A2 ON A1.PRO_ID = A2.PRO_ID AND A1.PRO_SEQ = A2.PRO_SEQ LEFT JOIN ARMUSER U ON A1.C_ESNTL_ID = U.ESNTL_ID LEFT JOIN ARMUSER PU ON A1.P_ESNTL_ID = PU.ESNTL_ID WHERE 1=1 AND A1.PRO_ID = #{searchProId}
AND DECRYPT(U.USER_NM) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchUserNm}, '%')

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY A1.PRO_ID) AS RNUM , COALESCE(A1.REQ_ID, '') AS REQ_ID , COALESCE(A1.PRO_ID, '') AS PRO_ID , COALESCE(A1.PRO_SEQ, '0') AS PRO_SEQ , COALESCE(A1.REQ_PRO_SEQ, '0') AS REQ_PRO_SEQ , COALESCE(A1.REQ_ESNTL_ID, '') AS REQ_ESNTL_ID , COALESCE(A1.C_ESNTL_ID, '') AS C_ESNTL_ID , COALESCE(DECRYPT(U.USER_NM), '') AS USER_NM , COALESCE(FN_MASK_PHONE(COALESCE(DECRYPT(U.MBTLNUM), ''), 'N'), '') AS C_MBTLNUM , COALESCE(U.SEXDSTN_CODE, '') AS C_SEXDSTN_CODE , COALESCE(U.BRTHDY, '') AS C_BRTHDY , COALESCE(DECRYPT(A1.HEAD_NM), '') AS HEAD_NM , COALESCE(A1.P_ESNTL_ID, '') AS P_ESNTL_ID , COALESCE(DECRYPT(A1.P_USER_NM), '') AS P_USER_NM , COALESCE(A1.PRO_TYPE, '') AS PRO_TYPE , CASE WHEN A1.PRO_TYPE = '01' THEN '1인탐구형' WHEN A1.PRO_TYPE = '02' THEN '모둠탐구형' ELSE '' END AS PRO_TYPE_NM , COALESCE(FN_MASK_PHONE(COALESCE(DECRYPT(A1.MBTLNUM), ''), 'N'), '') AS MBTLNUM , COALESCE(A1.BRTHDY, '') AS BRTHDY , COALESCE(DECRYPT(A1.P_IHIDNUM), '') AS P_IHIDNUM , COALESCE(DECRYPT(A1.C_IHIDNUM), '') AS C_IHIDNUM , COALESCE(A1.CERT_YN, 'N') AS CERT_YN , COALESCE(A1.SCHOOL_ID, '') AS SCHOOL_ID , COALESCE(A1.SCHOOL_GB, '') AS SCHOOL_GB , COALESCE(A1.SCHOOL_NM, '') AS SCHOOL_NM , COALESCE(A1.SCHOOL_LVL, 0) AS SCHOOL_LVL , COALESCE(A1.SCHOOL_NO, 0) AS SCHOOL_NO , CASE WHEN A1.SCHOOL_LVL IS NOT NULL AND A1.SCHOOL_NO IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(A1.SCHOOL_LVL, '학년 ', A1.SCHOOL_NO, '반') WHEN A1.SCHOOL_LVL IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(A1.SCHOOL_LVL, '학년') WHEN A1.SCHOOL_NO IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(A1.SCHOOL_NO, '반') ELSE '' END AS SCHOOL_CLASS , COALESCE(A1.PAY_BANK_CODE, '') AS PAY_BANK_CODE , COALESCE((select CODE_NM from LETTCCMMNDETAILCODE where CODE_ID = 'ARM002' and CODE = A1.PAY_BANK_CODE), '' ) as PAY_BANK_CODE_NM , COALESCE(A1.PAY_BANK, '') AS PAY_BANK , COALESCE(A1.HOLDER_NM, '') AS HOLDER_NM , COALESCE(A1.REQ_PART, '') AS REQ_PART , COALESCE(A1.PLAY_PART, '') AS PLAY_PART , COALESCE(A1.REQ_OBJ, '') AS REQ_OBJ , COALESCE(A1.REQ_PLAY, '') AS REQ_PLAY , COALESCE(A1.REQ_PLAN, '') AS REQ_PLAN , COALESCE(A1.MCHIL_YN, 'N') AS MCHIL_YN , COALESCE(A1.MCHIL_NM, '') AS MCHIL_NM , COALESCE(A1.REQ_DESC, '') AS REQ_DESC , COALESCE(A1.FILE_ID, '') AS FILE_ID , COALESCE(A1.RESULT_GB, '') AS RESULT_GB , A1.REQ_DT , A1.APRR_DT , A1.CHG_DT , A1.STOP_DT , COALESCE(A1.REA_DESC, '') AS REA_DESC , COALESCE(A1.STTUS_CODE, '') AS STTUS_CODE , CASE WHEN A1.STTUS_CODE = '01' THEN '임시저장' WHEN A1.STTUS_CODE = '02' THEN '신청' WHEN A1.STTUS_CODE = '03' THEN '승인' WHEN A1.STTUS_CODE = '04' THEN '완료' WHEN A1.STTUS_CODE = '11' THEN '반려' WHEN A1.STTUS_CODE = '12' THEN '중단' WHEN A1.STTUS_CODE = '99' THEN '취소' ELSE '' END AS STTUS_CODE_NM , COALESCE(A1.CHG_USER_ID, '') AS CHG_USER_ID , A1.CRT_DATE , A1.CHG_DATE , COALESCE(DECRYPT(U.ZIP), '') AS ZIP , COALESCE(DECRYPT(U.ADRES), '') AS ADRES , COALESCE(DECRYPT(U.DETAIL_ADRES), '') AS DETAIL_ADRES , COALESCE(CONCAT(DECRYPT(U.ADRES), ' ', DECRYPT(U.DETAIL_ADRES)), '') AS FULL_ADRES FROM ARTAPPM A1 LEFT JOIN ARMUSER U ON A1.C_ESNTL_ID = U.ESNTL_ID LEFT JOIN ARMUSER PU ON A1.P_ESNTL_ID = PU.ESNTL_ID WHERE 1 = 1 AND A1.PRO_ID = #{proId} ) A0
SELECT CONCAT('REQ_', LPAD(COALESCE(SUBSTRING(MAX(A1.REQ_ID), 5, 16), 0) + 1, 16, '0')) AS REQ_ID FROM ARTAPPM A1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ARTAPPM ( REQ_ID, REQ_PRO_SEQ, PRO_ID, PRO_SEQ, REQ_ESNTL_ID, C_ESNTL_ID, PRO_TYPE, P_ESNTL_ID, HEAD_NM, P_USER_NM, MBTLNUM, BRTHDY, P_IHIDNUM, C_IHIDNUM, CERT_YN, CRTFC_DN_VALUE, SCHOOL_ID, SCHOOL_GB, SCHOOL_NM, SCHOOL_LVL, SCHOOL_NO, PAY_BANK_CODE, PAY_BANK, HOLDER_NM, REQ_PART, PLAY_PART, REQ_OBJ, REQ_PLAY, REQ_PLAN, MCHIL_YN, MCHIL_NM, REQ_DESC, FILE_ID, RESULT_GB, REQ_DT, APRR_DT, CHG_DT, STOP_DT, REA_DESC, WORK_DT, STTUS_CODE, CHG_USER_ID, CRT_DATE, CHG_DATE ) VALUES ( #{reqId}, COALESCE(#{reqProSeq}, #{proSeq}, '0'), #{proId}, COALESCE(#{proSeq}, '0'), #{reqEsntlId}, #{cEsntlId}, #{proType}, #{pEsntlId}, ENCRYPT(#{headNm}), ENCRYPT(#{pUserNm}), ENCRYPT(REPLACE(#{mbtlnum}, '-', '')), #{brthdy}, ENCRYPT(#{pIhidnum}), ENCRYPT(#{cIhidnum}), COALESCE(#{certYn}, 'N'), #{crtfcDnValue}, #{schoolId}, #{schoolGb}, #{schoolNm}, COALESCE(#{schoolLvl}, 0), COALESCE(#{schoolNo}, 0), #{payBankCode}, #{payBank}, #{holderNm}, #{reqPart}, #{playPart}, #{reqObj}, #{reqPlay}, #{reqPlan}, COALESCE(#{mchilYn}, 'N'), #{mchilNm}, #{reqDesc}, #{fileId}, #{resultGb}, CASE WHEN #{sttusCode} = '02' THEN NOW() ELSE #{reqDt} END, CASE WHEN #{sttusCode} = '03' THEN NOW() ELSE #{aprrDt} END, NOW(), CASE WHEN #{sttusCode} = '12' THEN NOW() ELSE #{stopDt} END, #{reaDesc},
#{workDt} NULL , #{sttusCode}, #{UNIQ_ID}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE ARTAPPM SET PRO_SEQ = COALESCE(#{proSeq}, '0'), REQ_ESNTL_ID = #{reqEsntlId}, C_ESNTL_ID = #{cEsntlId}, PRO_TYPE = #{proType}, P_ESNTL_ID = #{pEsntlId}, HEAD_NM = ENCRYPT(#{headNm}), P_USER_NM = ENCRYPT(#{pUserNm}), MBTLNUM = ENCRYPT(REPLACE(#{mbtlnum}, '-', '')), BRTHDY = #{brthdy}, P_IHIDNUM = ENCRYPT(#{pIhidnum}), C_IHIDNUM = ENCRYPT(#{cIhidnum}), CERT_YN = COALESCE(#{certYn}, 'N'), CRTFC_DN_VALUE = #{crtfcDnValue}, SCHOOL_ID = #{schoolId}, SCHOOL_GB = #{schoolGb}, SCHOOL_NM = #{schoolNm}, SCHOOL_LVL = COALESCE(#{schoolLvl}, 0), SCHOOL_NO = COALESCE(#{schoolNo}, 0), PAY_BANK_CODE = #{payBankCode}, PAY_BANK = #{payBank}, HOLDER_NM = #{holderNm}, REQ_PART = #{reqPart}, PLAY_PART = #{playPart}, REQ_OBJ = #{reqObj}, REQ_PLAY = #{reqPlay}, REQ_PLAN = #{reqPlan}, MCHIL_YN = COALESCE(#{mchilYn}, 'N'), MCHIL_NM = #{mchilNm}, REQ_DESC = #{reqDesc}, FILE_ID = #{fileId}, RESULT_GB = #{resultGb}, REQ_DT = CASE WHEN #{sttusCode} = '02' THEN NOW() ELSE #{reqDt} END, APRR_DT = CASE WHEN #{sttusCode} = '03' THEN NOW() ELSE #{aprrDt} END, CHG_DT = NOW(), STOP_DT = CASE WHEN #{sttusCode} = '12' THEN NOW() ELSE #{stopDt} END, REA_DESC = #{reaDesc}, WORK_DT = #{workDt}, STTUS_CODE = #{sttusCode}, CHG_USER_ID = #{UNIQ_ID}, CHG_DATE = NOW() WHERE REQ_ID = #{reqId}
UPDATE ARTAPPM SET STUDY_CERT = #{studyCert}, CHG_DATE = NOW() WHERE REQ_ID = #{reqId}

UPDATE ARTAPPM SET STTUS_CODE = #{sttusCode}, CHG_DT = NOW(), CHG_DATE = NOW(), REQ_DT = CASE WHEN #{sttusCode} = '02' THEN NOW() ELSE REQ_DT END, APRR_DT = CASE WHEN #{sttusCode} = '03' THEN NOW() ELSE APRR_DT END, STOP_DT = CASE WHEN #{sttusCode} = '12' THEN NOW() ELSE STOP_DT END, REA_DESC = CASE WHEN #{sttusCode} = '11' THEN #{reaDesc} ELSE REA_DESC END WHERE REQ_ID = #{reqId}
UPDATE ARTAPPM SET STUDY_CERT = NULL, CHG_DATE = NOW() WHERE REQ_ID = #{reqId}
mapper.select: CALL f_changlist(#{aGubun}, #{proId}, #{proSeq}, #{reqEsntlId})
SELECT CONCAT('MAN_', LPAD(COALESCE(SUBSTRING(MAX(REQ_ID), 5, 16), 0) + 1, 16, '0')) AS REQ_ID FROM ARTAPMM

SELECT COALESCE(A.REQ_ID, '') AS REQ_ID , COALESCE(A.PRO_ID, '') AS PRO_ID , COALESCE(A.PRO_SEQ, 0) AS PRO_SEQ , COALESCE(P.PRO_NM, '') AS PRO_NM , COALESCE(A.REQ_ESNTL_ID, '') AS REQ_ESNTL_ID , COALESCE(A.REQ_PLAY, '') AS REQ_PLAY , COALESCE(A.REQ_DESC, '') AS REQ_DESC , COALESCE(A.FILE_ID, '') AS FILE_ID , COALESCE(A.RESULT_GB, '') AS RESULT_GB , IFNULL(DATE_FORMAT(A.REQ_DT, '%Y-%m-%d'), '') AS REQ_DT , IFNULL(DATE_FORMAT(A.APRR_DT, '%Y-%m-%d'), '') AS APRR_DT , IFNULL(DATE_FORMAT(A.CHG_DT, '%Y-%m-%d'), '') AS CHG_DT , IFNULL(DATE_FORMAT(A.STOP_DT, '%Y-%m-%d'), '') AS STOP_DT , COALESCE(A.REA_DESC, '') AS REA_DESC , COALESCE(A.COLLEGE_NM, '') AS COLLEGE_NM , COALESCE(A.LEAVE_YN, '') AS LEAVE_YN , COALESCE(A.MAJOR_NM, '') AS MAJOR_NM , COALESCE(A.SCHOOL_LVL, 0) AS SCHOOL_LVL , COALESCE(A.STUDENT_ID, '') AS STUDENT_ID , COALESCE(A.HSCHOOL_NM, '') AS HSCHOOL_NM , COALESCE(A.REQ_REASON, '') AS REQ_REASON , COALESCE(A.CAREER, '') AS CAREER , COALESCE(A.REQ_SUB, '') AS REQ_SUB , COALESCE(A.JOIN_TIME, '') AS JOIN_TIME , COALESCE(A.AGREE1_YN, '') AS AGREE1_YN , COALESCE(A.AGREE2_YN, '') AS AGREE2_YN , COALESCE(A.STTUS_CODE, '') AS STTUS_CODE , COALESCE(A.CHG_USER_ID, '') AS CHG_USER_ID , IFNULL(DATE_FORMAT(A.CRT_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), '') AS CRT_DATE , IFNULL(DATE_FORMAT(A.CHG_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), '') AS CHG_DATE , COALESCE(B.USER_SE, '') AS USER_SE , COALESCE(B.USER_ID, '') AS USER_ID , COALESCE(DECRYPT(B.USER_NM), '') AS USER_NM , COALESCE(FN_MASK_PHONE(COALESCE(DECRYPT(B.USR_TELNO), ''), 'N'), '') AS USR_TELNO , COALESCE(FN_MASK_PHONE(COALESCE(DECRYPT(B.MBTLNUM), ''), 'N'), '') AS MBTLNUM , COALESCE(DECRYPT(B.EMAIL_ADRES), '') AS EMAIL_ADRES , COALESCE(B.BRTHDY, '') AS BRTHDY , COALESCE(B.MBER_STTUS, '') AS MBER_STTUS , COALESCE(TRIM(CONCAT(COALESCE(DECRYPT(B.ZIP), ''), ' ', COALESCE(DECRYPT(B.ADRES), ''), ' ', COALESCE(DECRYPT(B.DETAIL_ADRES), ''))), '') AS FULL_ADRES , COALESCE(B.PROFILE_DESC, '') AS PROFILE_DESC FROM ARTAPMM A LEFT JOIN ARTPROM P ON A.PRO_ID = P.PRO_ID LEFT JOIN ARMUSER B ON A.REQ_ESNTL_ID = B.ESNTL_ID WHERE A.REQ_ID = #{reqId} AND (A.STTUS_CODE IS NULL OR A.STTUS_CODE != 'D')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ARTAPMM ( REQ_ID, PRO_ID, PRO_SEQ, REQ_ESNTL_ID, REQ_PLAY, REQ_DESC, FILE_ID, RESULT_GB, REQ_DT, APRR_DT, CHG_DT, STOP_DT, REA_DESC, COLLEGE_NM, LEAVE_YN, MAJOR_NM, SCHOOL_LVL, STUDENT_ID, HSCHOOL_NM, REQ_REASON, CAREER, REQ_SUB, JOIN_TIME, AGREE1_YN, AGREE2_YN, STTUS_CODE, CHG_USER_ID, CRT_DATE, CHG_DATE ) VALUES ( #{reqId}, #{proId}, COALESCE(#{proSeq}, 0), COALESCE(#{reqEsntlId}, ''), #{reqPlay}, #{reqDesc}, (CASE WHEN #{fileId} IS NULL OR TRIM(#{fileId}) = '' THEN NULL ELSE TRIM(#{fileId}) END), COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(#{resultGb}), ''), 'Y'), (CASE WHEN #{reqDt} IS NULL OR TRIM(#{reqDt}) = '' THEN NULL ELSE STR_TO_DATE(LEFT(TRIM(#{reqDt}), 10), '%Y-%m-%d') END), (CASE WHEN #{aprrDt} IS NULL OR TRIM(#{aprrDt}) = '' THEN NULL ELSE STR_TO_DATE(LEFT(TRIM(#{aprrDt}), 10), '%Y-%m-%d') END), (CASE WHEN #{chgDt} IS NULL OR TRIM(#{chgDt}) = '' THEN NULL ELSE STR_TO_DATE(LEFT(TRIM(#{chgDt}), 10), '%Y-%m-%d') END), (CASE WHEN #{stopDt} IS NULL OR TRIM(#{stopDt}) = '' THEN NULL ELSE STR_TO_DATE(LEFT(TRIM(#{stopDt}), 10), '%Y-%m-%d') END), #{reaDesc}, #{collegeNm}, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(#{leaveYn}), ''), 'N'), #{majorNm}, COALESCE(#{schoolLvl}, 0), #{studentId}, #{hschoolNm}, #{reqReason}, #{career}, (CASE WHEN #{reqSub} IS NULL OR TRIM(#{reqSub}) = '' THEN NULL ELSE LEFT(TRIM(#{reqSub}), 4) END), (CASE WHEN #{joinTime} IS NULL OR TRIM(#{joinTime}) = '' THEN NULL ELSE LEFT(TRIM(#{joinTime}), 64) END), (CASE WHEN #{agree1Yn} IS NULL OR TRIM(#{agree1Yn}) = '' THEN NULL ELSE LEFT(TRIM(#{agree1Yn}), 1) END), (CASE WHEN #{agree2Yn} IS NULL OR TRIM(#{agree2Yn}) = '' THEN NULL ELSE LEFT(TRIM(#{agree2Yn}), 1) END), COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(#{sttusCode}), ''), 'A'), #{chgUserId}, NOW(), NOW() )
